mainText:
Good morning, Kurt. It's Tuesday, June 23rd, 7 AM Pacific.

Weather in Kenmore: currently 66 degrees and clear. High today 88, becoming overcast this afternoon. No rain expected.

A heads up for Friday June 26th: 85 percent chance of thunderstorm, high only 64. Your Pack committee meeting is that evening, so bring an umbrella and jacket.

Calendar highlights over the next week: Today at 7 to 8 AM, dance. Thursday June 25th at 1:15 PM, dance plus a test entry you should delete. Friday June 26th at 2:45 PM, Dylan has an appointment. That same evening at 7 PM, Pack committee at Kenmore City Hall. Saturday at 3 PM, a block party. And Monday June 29th, all-day cooking camp.

Three calendar entries are flagged as suspicious: three test Taekwondo entries Thursday, Friday, and Saturday from 10 PM to 2:30 AM at Master Cho's Lynnwood. Four and a half hours at 10 PM is weird. Worth confirming they are real or deleting them.

Four emails need attention. OpenAI sent your ChatGPT export started yesterday at 8:45 PM. The download link usually arrives within a few hours and unblocks your Substack backlog. Google sent a security alert and a verification code back to back at 8:42 PM yesterday. Worth a 30 second check on your Google account activity. Bank of America sent two credit alerts, both informational. And Discover flagged a new statement, routine.

Also flagged but no action needed: your Cologuard kit has shipped.

Top three for today: First, check Gmail for the ChatGPT export download link. Second, decide how to continue the Outlook inbox drain given the tighter email budget. Third, the Pi 400 Substack outline is unblocked and ready to draft whenever you want.

LLM spend yesterday was 3 dollars 70 cents. Today so far, 52 cents.

Daily maintenance ran fine: Outlook junk-routing at 6 AM, and this briefing at 7 AM.

Have a good one.
